sentence: 她特别喜欢印象派的绘画风格。
pinyin: Tā tèbié xǐhuān yìnxiàngpài de huìhuà fēnggé.
english: She particularly loves the painting style of Impressionism.

meaning: 1. to undertake to purchase sth; 2. to subscribe (to share issue)
pinyin: Tā rèngòu le yī bǎi gǔ xīn gǔ.
english: He subscribed to one hundred shares of the new stock issue.

meaning: 1. most recent in the past; 2. recent; 3. late; 4. recently
sentence: 晚近几年，智能手机的普及速度很快。
pinyin: Wǎnjìn jǐ nián, zhìnéng shǒujī de pǔjí sùdù hěn kuài.
english: In recent years, smartphones have spread very quickly.

sentence: 金融市场今天波动较大。
pinyin: Jīnróng shìchǎng jīntiān bōdòng jiào dà.
english: The financial market saw large fluctuations today.
